pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuse Triton TMA MLP forward with CUTLASS EVT backward plus fast GPU-resident causal n-gram tilt as sparse auxiliary memory for subword certainty.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward for MLP
GPU-resident causal n-gram tilt acting as sparse auxiliary memory
Uniform int6 GPTQ with LR floor warmdown
